name: ConferenceEventPlanner
description: a simple application to manage academic or internal events, including sessions, speakers, rooms, and schedules

ada3ce74-27f5-4906-b66a-60055a3d9cdf.constraint:
context Session
inv NoRoomTimeOverlap:
  Session.allInstances()->forAll(s1, s2 |
    s1 <> s2 implies
      s1.room <> s2.room or
      s1.scheduleSlot.endTime <= s2.scheduleSlot.startTime or
      s1.scheduleSlot.startTime >= s2.scheduleSlot.endTime
  )

context Session
inv NoRoomTimeOverlap:
  Session.allInstances()->forAll(s1, s2 |
    s1 <> s2 implies
      s1.room <> s2.room or
      s1.scheduleSlot.endTime <= s2.scheduleSlot.startTime or
      s1.scheduleSlot.startTime >= s2.scheduleSlot.endTime
  )
